description: Eval cases for API design issues: input validation, pagination, breaking changes, response consistency, and versioning

cases.name: Missing request validation in create user endpoint
cases.description: Request body fields are trusted without schema validation or constraints
cases.code_snippet:
@app.post('/users')
def create_user():
    payload = request.get_json()
    email = payload['email']
    age = int(payload['age'])
    db.insert_user(email=email, age=age)
    return {'ok': True}, 201

cases.name: Unbounded list endpoint without pagination
cases.description: Orders endpoint fetches full table and returns all records in one response

cases.name: Response contract changed without compatibility path
cases.description: Endpoint renamed and removed response fields used by existing clients

cases.name: Inconsistent response shape for the same endpoint
cases.description: Search endpoint returns object for multi-result and bare object for single-result

cases.name: Breaking request requirements on unversioned endpoint
cases.description: New required field introduced without API version bump

cases.name: Versioned and paginated endpoint with validation
cases.description: Well-designed endpoint should not produce API design findings
